messages.text: A whirling cage of bone shards rises to orbit your body, battering aside the blows meant to fell you.
A whirling cage of bone shards rises to orbit {name}.
The orbiting bone shards crumble to dust, their guard spent.
The bone shards orbiting {name} crumble to dust.
{name} is guarded by a whirling cage of orbiting bone shards.
